normal.label: Normal
normal.description: Everything is running gently and cleanly — a good state to archive as a baseline day.

maintenance.label: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Intentional quiet mode, planned maintenance, or focus windows that should not count as downtime.

notice.label: Notice
notice.description: A mild dip in energy or rhythm has begun to affect the day, but the system still mostly operates.

warning.label: Warning
warning.description: Clear discomfort or emotional drag is reducing capacity and requires active recovery.

critical.label: Critical
critical.description: A hard-stop state where normal operation is no longer realistic and full recovery takes priority.
